message:
fix: prevent Benchmark card from showing demo data in live mode (#3328) (#3342)

Set demoWhenEmpty to false in useCachedBenchmarkReports so that an empty
API/stream response in non-demo mode renders the "No benchmark data available"
empty state instead of silently injecting demo data with a Demo badge.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
